name: workplace_safety_mutual_aid_request_harbor_st_lt
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Workplace Safety, the situation tagged internally around workplace safety mutual aid request harbor st lt has converged with local pressure in the Lumen City corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Ravi Diallo
agents.identity: I am Ravi Diallo, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Workplace Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mateo Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Mateo Nielsen, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Workplace Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect long term.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to long term to secure short term before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Ravi Diallo must choose under short term versus long term. What does Ravi Diallo do?
